$comment: Claude Desktop / stdio-client config for the Cipher & Row freight verification MCP. Paste the mcpServers block into your claude_desktop_config.json (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json, Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json), then restart Claude. This uses the mcp-remote bridge so a stdio-only client can reach the remote HTTP server; OAuth 2.1 + PKCE runs in your browser on first connect, so there is no key to paste. If your Claude plan supports custom connectors natively (Pro / Max / Team / Enterprise), you can instead add the URL directly under Settings -> Connectors -> Add custom connector and skip this file.
